Calculation.Text: // Prettify Let ( [ ft = Substitute("az09-._"; ["AZ"; "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ"]; ["az"; "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"]; ["09"; "0123456789" ]); engText= Substitute ( Lower(Text); ["å" ; "a"] ; ["ä" ; "a"]; ["ö" ; "o"]; [" " ; "-"]; ["---" ; "-"]; ["--" ; "-"]; ["–" ; "-"] ) ]; Filter(engText; ft) )
